历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13845 → 13355 → 35635 (medical care category) → 37744 (medical care category) → 24764. In recent years, fluctuations have been severe. In 2023–2024, due to separate scoring for medical care categories, abnormally low rankings appeared. In 2025, it returned to 24764 as the baseline. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan for Physics Category was 122 in 2021, 124 in 2022, 99 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and 86 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 100, an increase of about 16.3% compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, and competition pressure has eased somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is approximately 46th on the main list, with stable rankings in the 40–46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive university category. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a campus safety incident where a male college student maliciously used a female classmate's photo. The Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, and the level of application attention is acceptable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education received A- and Pharmacy received A-, with a total of 2 A- or above disciplines. Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, and other disciplines are relatively strong but have not entered the A-class rating.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's engineering/medical major offerings. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025), with an estimated 734,000 in the Physics Category, significantly expanding the competition base. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal to Henan examinees. The proportion of enrollment from Henan in recent years is about 6–7%, making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 24764, the 2026 expansion of about 16.3% shifts the ranking upward (harder to enter) by about 2418 places, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in Henan intensifies competition, the reputation is somewhat negative but Douyin popularity is acceptable, and other factors; considering the additional competitive pressure from the surge in examinee numbers, a slight upward adjustment to 27232 is made; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27232, with a range of 26732–27732.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 26000), you can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 27700), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy, and Mathematics to ensure admission probability.
